common.unknownError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

auth.registerSubtitle: Create a supplier account to start onboarding.
auth.verifyEmailBody: We've sent a verification link to {email}. Follow it to continue.
auth.verifyEmailHint: Open the email on this computer — the link points to this machine and won't work from a phone.
auth.wrongPortal: That portal belongs to a different organization type.

field.nationalEstablishmentNumberHint: We use this to retrieve your registry record from the Companies Control Department.
field.professionLicenceNumberHint: We use this to retrieve your licence details from the licensing authority.

bootstrap.title: Start your application
bootstrap.subtitle: Two numbers are all we need to begin.
bootstrap.derivedNotice: You won't be asked to type your company name, legal type, address, capital, partners, signatories or tax number — we retrieve those from the official registries.
bootstrap.alreadyRegistered: This establishment number is already registered to another organization. Contact us if you believe this is an error.

wizard.identityIntro: This is what the registries returned for the numbers you provided. These values are read-only — corrections are made by re-querying the source, not by editing here.
wizard.licenceIntro: Licence details retrieved from the licensing authority.
wizard.submitNotice: Submitting starts the 24 business-hour review target.
wizard.validationFailed: Something in this step wasn't accepted. Check the highlighted fields and try again.
wizard.invalidState: This application can't be changed in its current state. Refresh to see its latest status.

consents.intro: All of the following are required before your application can be reviewed.
consents.allRequired: All consents are required to submit your application.

GOVERNMENT_LOOKUP_AUTHORIZATION.label: Government registry lookup authorization
GOVERNMENT_LOOKUP_AUTHORIZATION.description: You authorize us to query the Companies Control Department, the Income and Sales Tax Department, and your licensing authority for the records relating to your business.

BANK_DISCLOSURE_AUTHORIZATION.label: Disclosure to financing banks
BANK_DISCLOSURE_AUTHORIZATION.description: You authorize us to share your verified business and invoice information with banks on the platform so they can assess a financing request.

TERMS_OF_SERVICE.label: Terms of service
TERMS_OF_SERVICE.description: You accept the platform terms governing listings, offers, contracts and settlement.

PRIVACY_POLICY.label: Privacy policy
PRIVACY_POLICY.description: You acknowledge how your business and personal data is stored, used and retained.

bankAccount.intro: Funds are disbursed to this account. It must belong to the business, not to an individual.
bankAccount.ibanHint: Jordanian IBAN, 30 characters, starting with JO.
bankAccount.accountHolderHint: As it appears on the account — this is checked against your registry record.
bankAccount.evidencePlaceholder: Document upload is not available yet — it ships with the documents feature. Your reviewer will request evidence if it's needed.

ibanError.FORMAT: This doesn't look like an IBAN. Check for typos.
ibanError.LENGTH: A Jordanian IBAN is 30 characters long.
ibanError.CHECKSUM: This IBAN's check digits don't match. Please re-enter it.

sla.title: Review time
sla.notStarted: The review clock starts when you submit your application.
sla.businessHoursNote: Business time is counted Sunday to Thursday, 08:00–17:00 Amman time, excluding public holidays.

pauseReason.INFORMATION_REQUIRED: We've asked you for something. The clock resumes as soon as you respond.
pauseReason.GOVERNMENT_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: A government registry hasn't responded yet. The clock is paused until it does — this has no bearing on your application's outcome.
pauseReason.UNSPECIFIED: The clock is paused. It resumes automatically once the review continues.

government.readOnlyNotice: These values come from official registries and can't be edited by anyone, including us. If something is wrong, we re-query the source.
government.nothingRetrievedYet: Nothing has been retrieved from the registries yet.
government.sourcesExplainer: Which registries we've queried and whether each has responded. Whether a source responded is separate from what it said.
government.noResponseExplainer: A registry that hasn't responded tells us nothing about your business. It doesn't affect your assessment, and it can't cause a rejection.

sourceDescription.CCD: Companies Control Department — company registration record
sourceDescription.ISTD: Income and Sales Tax Department — tax registration
sourceDescription.GAM: Greater Amman Municipality / licensing authority — profession licence

informationRequests.title: Requests for information
informationRequests.emptyBody: We'll show anything we need from you here.
informationRequests.resumesClock: Sending your response resumes the review clock.
informationRequests.attachmentPlaceholder: Attaching a document isn't available yet — describe what you have and your reviewer will follow up.

conditional.title: Your account is approved, with one condition outstanding
conditional.body: You can use the platform and complete what's outstanding. Submitting invoices and creating listings stay unavailable until the condition is cleared.

financingGate.title: Not available yet
financingGate.conditional: Your account is approved with a condition still outstanding. Financing actions become available once it's cleared.
financingGate.pending: Financing actions become available once your application is approved.
financingGate.notApproved: Your application wasn't approved, so financing actions aren't available.

ineligibility.title: We can't onboard this business in the current version
ineligibility.body: Zimmamless currently works with companies registered with the Companies Control Department. Sole proprietorships and businesses that can't be verified through CCD or a supported licensing authority aren't supported in this version.
ineligibility.whyNow: This is a limitation of what we can verify today, not an assessment of your business.
ineligibility.whatNext: If your business is registered under a different legal form, or you register one, you're welcome to apply again. Support for more entity types is planned.

decision.title: Record a decision
decision.notesHint: Recorded with the decision in the audit trail.
decision.notesBecomeRequest: These notes are sent to the supplier as the information request.
decision.alreadyDecided: This application has already been decided.
decision.soleProprietorshipNotice: The registry records this entity as a sole proprietorship, which is not eligible in V3 (ZM-SON-013). Use the reason code "Entity type not eligible in this version".

effect.APPROVED: The organization becomes active and can submit invoices.
effect.APPROVED_CONDITIONAL: The supplier can log in and complete outstanding items, but financing actions stay disabled.
effect.INFORMATION_REQUIRED: The review clock pauses until the supplier responds.
effect.REJECTED: The application is closed with the reason code recorded.

COMPANY_NOT_ACTIVE.label: Company suspended or struck off
COMPANY_NOT_ACTIVE.supplier: The registry shows this company as suspended or struck off. Once the registry record is active again, you're welcome to apply.

COMPANY_NOT_FOUND.label: Company not found in the registry
COMPANY_NOT_FOUND.supplier: We couldn't find a registry record for the establishment number provided. Please check the number and apply again.

COMPANY_IN_LIQUIDATION.label: Company in liquidation or insolvency
COMPANY_IN_LIQUIDATION.supplier: The registry shows this company as being in liquidation or insolvency proceedings, which we can't onboard.

LICENCE_NOT_VALID.label: Profession licence suspended, cancelled, or activity prohibited
LICENCE_NOT_VALID.supplier: The licensing authority shows the profession licence as not currently valid for this activity.

SIGNATORY_AUTHENTICITY_FAILED.label: Signatory authenticity could not be established
SIGNATORY_AUTHENTICITY_FAILED.supplier: We couldn't establish the authenticity of the authorized signatory documentation.

ESSENTIAL_CONSENT_REFUSED.label: Essential consent refused
ESSENTIAL_CONSENT_REFUSED.supplier: One of the consents required to verify your business and share information with banks wasn't granted, so we can't proceed.

BANK_ACCOUNT_OWNERSHIP_UNPROVEN.label: Bank account ownership not established
BANK_ACCOUNT_OWNERSHIP_UNPROVEN.supplier: We couldn't confirm that the disbursement account belongs to your business. Ownership evidence or a corrected account will let us continue.

LEGAL_PROHIBITION_OR_SANCTIONS_MATCH.label: Legal prohibition or sanctions match
LEGAL_PROHIBITION_OR_SANCTIONS_MATCH.supplier: We're unable to onboard this business for legal or compliance reasons.

ENTITY_TYPE_NOT_ELIGIBLE_V3.label: Entity type not eligible in this version
ENTITY_TYPE_NOT_ELIGIBLE_V3.supplier: This entity type isn't supported in the current version of the platform.

ESSENTIAL_FIELD_MISSING.label: Essential information missing
ESSENTIAL_FIELD_MISSING.supplier: We need one more piece of information before the review can continue.

SIGNATORY_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED.label: Signatory evidence required
SIGNATORY_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED.supplier: The account user doesn't appear among the authorized signatories on the registry record. A recent signatory certificate or authorization document will resolve this.

LICENCE_COPY_REQUIRED.label: Licence copy or correct number required
LICENCE_COPY_REQUIRED.supplier: We need a current copy of the profession licence, or a corrected licence number.

OPERATIONAL_ITEM_OUTSTANDING.label: Operational item outstanding
OPERATIONAL_ITEM_OUTSTANDING.supplier: One non-material item is still outstanding. Financing actions become available once it's cleared.

ENTITY_NOT_FOUND_IN_REGISTRY.label: Not found in the registry (automated)
ENTITY_NOT_FOUND_IN_REGISTRY.supplier: We couldn't find a registry record for the establishment number provided. Please check the number and apply again.

SOLE_PROPRIETORSHIP_NOT_ELIGIBLE.label: Sole proprietorship (automated)
SOLE_PROPRIETORSHIP_NOT_ELIGIBLE.supplier: Sole proprietorships can't be verified through the company registry in this version of the platform, so we can't complete onboarding for this establishment type yet.

REGISTRY_STATUS_SUSPENDED.label: Registry status: suspended (automated)
REGISTRY_STATUS_SUSPENDED.supplier: The registry currently shows this company as suspended. Once the registry record is active again, you're welcome to apply.

REGISTRY_STATUS_STRUCK_OFF.label: Registry status: struck off (automated)
REGISTRY_STATUS_STRUCK_OFF.supplier: The registry currently shows this company as struck off. If the registry record is reinstated, you're welcome to apply.

REGISTRY_STATUS_UNDER_LIQUIDATION.label: Registry status: under liquidation (automated)
REGISTRY_STATUS_UNDER_LIQUIDATION.supplier: The registry shows this company as being in liquidation proceedings, which we can't onboard.

LICENCE_SUSPENDED.label: Licence suspended (automated)
LICENCE_SUSPENDED.supplier: The licensing authority shows this profession licence as suspended. Once it's active again, you're welcome to apply.

LICENCE_CANCELLED.label: Licence cancelled (automated)
LICENCE_CANCELLED.supplier: The licensing authority shows this profession licence as cancelled. With a valid licence, you're welcome to apply.

wizard.validationFailed: Some details could not be accepted. Check the highlighted fields and try again.
wizard.invalidState: This invoice is no longer a draft, so it cannot be changed here.

new.title: New invoice submission
new.intro: You will identify the buyer, upload the electronic invoice, set the minimum net amount you will accept, and confirm the supplier declarations. Nothing is visible to any bank until you activate a listing.

list.empty: You have not submitted any invoices yet.

detail.notFound: This invoice could not be found.

buyer.intro: Search for the buyer named on the invoice. The platform never chooses a buyer for you — you must select one explicitly, even when only one result comes back.
buyer.manualReviewNotice: More than one record matched. Check the establishment number carefully before selecting — the platform cannot tell these apart for you.
buyer.noCandidatesHint: Check the spelling, or search by the national establishment number instead.
buyer.contactNotice: These details are the ones you use at the buyer. They are recorded as supplier-provided and are not the buyer’s official registry contact.
buyer.contactRequired: Enter the contact name, role and phone number to continue.
buyer.blockedGeneric: This buyer cannot be financed while its registry record is in its current state.

blocked.SUSPENDED: This company’s registry record is currently suspended, so invoices naming it cannot be financed. This is a fact about the buyer’s registration and says nothing about your business.
blocked.STRUCK_OFF: This company has been struck off the commercial register, so invoices naming it cannot be financed. This is a fact about the buyer’s registration and says nothing about your business.

review.UNDER_LIQUIDATION: This company is under liquidation. You can still select it, and a member of the platform team will review the submission before it becomes eligible.
review.UNKNOWN: The registry did not report a status for this company. You can still select it, and a member of the platform team will review the submission before it becomes eligible.

invoice.intro: Upload the electronic invoice first. We read it and offer the values back to you — you confirm or correct every one of them.

field.einvoiceIdentifierHint: The identifier printed on the Jordanian electronic invoice.
field.dueDateHint: Must be at least 7 days away.
field.faceValueHint: The total amount of the invoice, including tax.

extraction.title: What we read from the document
extraction.bothKeptNotice: Your corrections are recorded alongside what the machine read — they never replace or erase it. Both versions stay on file and are available to reviewers.
extraction.noValues: Nothing has been extracted from this document yet.
extraction.prefill: Fill the form with these values
extraction.mismatchGuidance: One or more values you entered differ from what we read. That is not necessarily a problem — enter what the invoice actually says, and both readings will be kept.

explain.INVALID: The QR code was read but its contents did not match the invoice. A member of the platform team will check this.
explain.UNAVAILABLE: No QR code was found on this document. Nothing further is needed from you.
explain.UNPARSED: The QR code was found but its format is not one we recognise, so nothing was taken from it. A member of the platform team will review it manually. This does not count against your submission.

documents.optionalIntro: Supporting documents are optional here. Some banks ask for them before making an offer, so attaching them can help.
documents.downloadUnavailable: This document is not available to download right now.

desc.EINVOICE: Required. The Jordanian electronic invoice, as a PDF or image.
desc.PURCHASE_ORDER: The buyer’s order for the goods or services.
desc.DELIVERY_NOTE: Evidence that the goods or services were delivered.
desc.STATEMENT_OF_ACCOUNT: A recent statement showing the balance with this buyer.
desc.CREDIT_NOTE: Any credit note, return or adjustment affecting this invoice.

error.mimeType: Upload a PDF, PNG or JPEG file.
error.tooLarge: This file is larger than 15 MB. Upload a smaller file.

minimum.intro: Set the least you are willing to receive for this invoice.
minimum.label: Minimum NET amount you will receive
minimum.hint: Net means after every deduction — the bank’s charges, the platform commission and the listing fee. This is the money that actually reaches your account.
minimum.privacyNote: Banks never see this figure. It is used only to filter out offers that would pay you less than this, and it is never shown to any bank at any point.
minimum.exceedsFaceValue: This is more than the invoice is worth. Enter an amount up to the face value.

declarations.intro: All eight statements must be true. You are confirming them as the supplier of record.
declarations.allRequired: Every statement must be confirmed before you can submit.
declarations.isAuthentic: This invoice is authentic and represents a real commercial transaction.
declarations.goodsDelivered: The goods or services were delivered in line with the commercial relationship.
declarations.unpaidAndNotCancelled: This invoice is unpaid and has not been cancelled.
declarations.noKnownDispute: There is no known dispute, return, or undisclosed discount affecting this invoice.
declarations.notPreviouslyFinanced: This invoice has not previously been sold, assigned, pledged, or financed.
declarations.buyerIsNamedEntity: The buyer I selected is the entity named on the invoice.
declarations.contactIsBuyerRep: The contact details I gave belong to a representative of the buyer that I actually deal with.
declarations.acceptsRecourse: I accept recourse and indemnification for false declarations, as set out in the contract.

review.intro: Check everything below before submitting. After submission the platform runs its automated checks.
review.submitNotice: Submitting starts verification. It does not publish anything to banks — that is a separate step you take later, and you will see the listing fee before it applies.

duplicate.title: This invoice is already on the platform
duplicate.body: An invoice with the same buyer, number, date, value and tax has already been submitted. Only one active submission can exist for any invoice, so this one has been blocked and a review record has been opened.
duplicate.nextSteps: Nothing you entered has been lost — this submission is still a draft. If you believe this is a mistake, contact the platform team and quote the reference below.

verification.title: Verification results
verification.notRunYet: Verification has not run yet. It starts when you submit the invoice.
verification.noChecks: No individual checks were recorded for this run.
verification.reviewExplanation: One or more checks need a person to look at them. This is a normal part of the process and does not mean anything has been decided.

check.IDENTITY_MATCH: Supplier and buyer match the invoice
check.OCR_CONSISTENCY: Read values match what you entered

dataAvailability.label: Data availability
dataAvailability.tooltip: Shows how much of the government data used for this score was actually retrieved. A lower figure never lowers the score itself — a source that did not answer is treated as unknown, not as a negative finding.

factors.none: No factors were recorded for this score.

positive.buyerActive: The buyer's registry record is active.
positive.verificationPassed: The invoice passed every automated check.
positive.cleanHistory: No adverse conduct history on this platform.

risk.verificationReview: The invoice's automated checks need review.
risk.shortTenor: The invoice matures in under 7 days.
risk.priorDuplicate: A prior submission from this supplier collided with an existing fingerprint.

risk.fallbackNotice: This score was produced by the deterministic rules engine only — the machine-learning service was unavailable ({reason}). The eligibility and fraud rules that this score can never override were still fully applied.
risk.disclaimer: This score is decision support only. It is not a guarantee, a credit rating, or a substitute for your own credit decision.
risk.syntheticDataNotice: This model is trained on clearly labelled synthetic data for this build. Treat scores as illustrative, not as a reflection of real payment history.
risk.notAvailable: A Trust Score has not been calculated for this transaction yet.

feed.intro: Listings your bank is eligible to review, evaluated against your active policy filter.
feed.empty: No listings are open for offers right now.

detail.title: Listing
detail.notFound: This listing could not be found.
detail.doubleFinancingNotice: The platform is the single point of control against the same invoice being financed twice, across every bank on the marketplace — confidentiality between banks does not weaken that control.

listing.intro: Activating a listing opens it to eligible banks for offers. The listing fee is incurred at activation whether or not financing ultimately succeeds.
listing.feeWarning: This fee applies as soon as the listing is activated, regardless of whether financing succeeds.
listing.confirmActivate: Activate and pay the listing fee

offer.title: Create an offer
offer.notFound: This offer could not be found.
offer.alreadyOffered: Your bank already has a current offer on this listing. Withdraw it from "My offers" before submitting a new one.
offer.belowFloor: This offer does not currently meet the supplier's requirements.
offer.windowClosed: The offer submission window for this listing has closed.
offer.notEligible: Your bank is not eligible for this listing.
offer.validationFailed: The gross funding amount cannot exceed the invoice's outstanding amount.

transactionTypeExplain.INVOICE_FINANCING: The bank advances funds against the invoice; the supplier remains responsible for it under the terms of the offer.
transactionTypeExplain.RECEIVABLE_PURCHASE: The bank buys the receivable outright.
transactionTypeExplain.RECEIVABLE_ASSIGNMENT: The right to collect the receivable is formally assigned to the bank.
transactionTypeExplain.OTHER: A structure not covered by the standard categories — described in the offer's conditions.

recourseTypeExplain.FULL_RECOURSE: If the buyer does not pay, the supplier is fully responsible for repaying the bank.
recourseTypeExplain.LIMITED_RECOURSE: The supplier's responsibility if the buyer does not pay is capped or conditional.
recourseTypeExplain.NON_RECOURSE: The bank bears the risk of buyer non-payment; the supplier has no repayment obligation.
recourseTypeExplain.OTHER: A recourse structure not covered by the standard categories — described in the offer's conditions.

offer.serverComputedNote: Computed by the platform when the offer is created. The figures below are a live preview and are always reconciled to what the platform actually records.
offer.notSelectedExplain: The supplier accepted a different offer. No information about the winning bank or any other offer is shared.

offers.myOffersEmpty: Your bank has not submitted any offers yet.
offers.approvalQueueEmpty: Nothing is waiting for your approval.
offers.ownOfferNote: You created this offer — a different approver must review it.

policyFilters.title: Policy filters
policyFilters.intro: Filters determine which marketplace listings your bank is shown (ZM-MKT-001/002). A listing must match an active filter to appear in your feed.
policyFilters.empty: No policy filters configured yet — your bank will not see any listings until one is active.
policyFilters.name: Filter name

comparison.title: Compare offers
comparison.intro: Every active offer on this listing, in the order it was submitted. Nothing here is ranked or recommended — the decision is yours.
comparison.noListing: This invoice has not been listed on the marketplace yet.
comparison.empty: No offers have been submitted on this listing yet.

acceptance.irreversibleWarning: Accepting is atomic and irreversible. Once confirmed, this offer is locked in and every other offer on this listing is automatically declined.
acceptance.confirmAccept: Accept and lock in this offer
acceptance.successIntro: This offer is now locked in. The invoice cannot be relisted or claimed by any other financing.
acceptance.rejectAllExplain: Every offer on this listing will be declined and the invoice returns to eligible, free to be relisted. This cannot be undone.
acceptance.allRejected: All offers on this listing were rejected. The invoice has returned to eligible.

conditions.title: Conditions
conditions.intro: Every condition attached to the accepted offer. Mandatory conditions must be fulfilled before a contract can be generated.

contract.title: Contract
contract.notGenerated: No contract has been generated for this transaction yet.
contract.notReady: This transaction is not yet ready for a contract.

checkFailure.CONDITIONS_UNFULFILLED: Every mandatory condition must be fulfilled or waived first.
checkFailure.DECLARATIONS_NOT_RECONFIRMED: The supplier's declarations could not be reconfirmed.
checkFailure.BANK_ACCOUNT_UNVERIFIED: The supplier's disbursement bank account is not yet verified.

contract.canonicalLanguageNote: The English text governs in the event of any discrepancy between languages.
contract.notSignatory: Only an authorized signatory for your organization can sign this contract.
contract.listEmpty: No transactions have reached a contract yet.

bank.title: Funding
bank.subtitle: Record transfers you have executed and issue the confirmation code the supplier needs.
bank.markSentNotFunded: This records that you executed the transfer. It does not complete funding — the supplier must also confirm receipt with the one-time code.
bank.providerReferenceHint: Your own reference for the transfer, if you have one.
bank.otpOutOfBand: Pass the code to the supplier directly — by phone or in person, not through the platform.
bank.awaitingSupplier: Waiting for the supplier to confirm receipt.

supplier.title: Funding
supplier.subtitle: Confirm the funds you have received and see how your payout was calculated.
supplier.empty: You have no transactions at the funding stage.
supplier.awaitingBank: The bank has not yet recorded the transfer. You will be notified when it does.
supplier.funded: Funding is complete. Your payout is on its way.

otp.shownOnce: Shown once. It is not stored and cannot be shown again.
otp.dismissed: Code hidden. Generate a new one if it was not passed on.
otp.notASignature: This code confirms receipt of funds. It is not a signature and carries no signing authority.
otp.noResendsLeft: You have generated the maximum number of codes for this transaction.

confirm.instructions: Enter the six-digit code the bank gave you.

settlement.title: Settlement
settlement.manualReview: This payout needs platform operations to review it before it can be retried.
settlement.failed: The payout attempt failed. Attempts so far: {attempts}.

timeline.title: Payments
timeline.empty: No payments have been reported yet.
timeline.awaitingExplainer: This invoice passed its due date and the bank has not yet reported whether the buyer paid. This is not a record of non-payment. No action is needed from you.
timeline.pausedExplainer: Automatic reminders and status changes are paused for this transaction while the matter is open.

report.title: Report a buyer payment
report.notesHint: Visible to your bank only. Never shown to the supplier.

confirm.title: Confirm the status
confirm.explainer: Only you can say whether the buyer paid. Until you confirm, the platform records this as awaiting confirmation and makes no claim about the buyer.
confirm.PARTIALLY_PAID: The buyer paid part of it

dispute.title: Raise a dispute
dispute.explainer: Raising a dispute pauses automatic reminders and status changes while the matter is open. The platform records what you and the other party agree; it does not decide the outcome.

recourse.title: Recourse
recourse.amountHint: Cannot exceed the amount you advanced.

reason.NON_DELIVERY: The goods or services were not delivered

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.subtitle: Every recorded mutation on the platform — who did what, to which entity, and when. Read-only by design.
audit.filterInvalid: The filter takes an entity ID (UUID), not a reference number — paste the id from the entity's detail screen.

timeMachine.title: Demo time machine
timeMachine.badge: Platform only · never available in production
timeMachine.intro: Move the whole system clock forward to demonstrate maturity and escalation.
timeMachine.ahead: Clock is {days} day(s) ahead — effective date {date}.
timeMachine.notArmed: The time machine is not armed in this environment.
timeMachine.error: Could not move the demo clock.

settings.title: Platform settings
settings.subtitle: Current configuration. Editable keys are the ones an operator tunes between demos; every change is audited.
settings.invalidJson: The value must be valid JSON (e.g. [30,14,7] or true).

tiers.title: Commission tiers
tiers.subtitle: Tiers are created, never edited — a new tier supersedes an old one.
